hotel_name: Park Hyatt Jeddah - Marina, Club and Spa
raw_description:
With a seafront location on Jeddah’s Corniche and an infinity pool overlooking the Red Sea, this 5-star designer hotel is located in Al Hamra District.

It features spacious rooms with flat-screen TVs and high-speed internet.The high-tech rooms of Park Hyatt Jeddah are decorated in contemporary style with Arab-Andalusian influences. The bathrooms are equipped with rain showers and separate bathtubs. The majority of rooms enjoy scenic views of the resorts garden and partial views of the Red Sea

The 3 restaurants of Park Hyatt Jeddah - Marina, Club and Spa offers Mediterranean flavours, Andalusian delicacies and Middle Eastern cuisine. Exclusive teas, light meals and delicious deserts are offered at the Lounge.

Evania Ladies’ Spa includes indoor and outdoor pools, and 7 treatment rooms with private terraces. A beauty salon and nutritional professionals are available, as well as caviar and thermal mud massages.

Seba Gentlemen's Sports and Wellness Centre offers a state-of-the-art gym, tennis and squash courts and a hammam exclusively for men.

King Fahad Fountain is 1 km from Park Hyatt Jeddah, Jeddah, while Jeddah Mall is 3.9 km away. The nearest airport is King Abdulaziz International Airport, 17 km from the property.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.3for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Park Hyatt Jeddah - Marina, Club and Spa. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including 3 swimming pools, Free WiFi, Free parking.
